title: Claude FM 🎵 music for thinking and building
summary: Claude FM is a music streaming service made and curated by musicians, designed as background music for thinking and building work. It is offered as a product by Anthropic alongside their Claude AI assistant.
writeup: This video introduces Claude FM, a music streaming service from Anthropic made and curated by musicians and designed as background audio for thinking and building work. It is positioned as a product offered alongside the Claude AI assistant. The takeaway: Anthropic is extending its lineup beyond the assistant into a focus-oriented music service framed around developer and knowledge work.
